allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest add card table badge dialog input label select textarea tabs avatar dropdown-menu separator sheet calendar popover form sonner command scroll-area progress tooltip chart -y)

Bash(node -e "const bcrypt = require\(''bcryptjs''\); bcrypt.hash\(''admin123'', 12\).then\(h => { console.log\(''hash:'', h\); bcrypt.compare\(''admin123'', h\).then\(r => console.log\(''compare:'', r\)\); }\);")
Bash(node -e "const bcrypt = require\(''bcryptjs''\); bcrypt.compare\(''admin123'', ''$2b$12$jgAQSZ22lKTeSjVaBfWnr.LGvtwgz13OU4hhMpbLF2JnO.OVZfb8.''\).then\(r => console.log\(''match:'', r\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const bcrypt = require\(''bcryptjs''\); console.log\(typeof bcrypt.compare, typeof bcrypt.default\);")
Bash(node -e "import\(''bcryptjs''\).then\(m => console.log\(''default:'', typeof m.default, ''compare:'', typeof m.compare, ''keys:'', Object.keys\(m\).slice\(0,10\)\)\);")
